implementing_department: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India
description: Income support scheme providing financial assistance to eligible farmer families.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2,000
eligibility: Ownership of cultivable land as per state land records

steps: Apply through PM-KISAN portal or Common Service Centre

additional_notes: Institutional landholders and income tax payers are excluded.
